calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Jun-18-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Bennie Olevia Beck, Petitioner in Pro Per.

The Court confirmed with Ms. Beck that the proposed order had been submitted. Upon receipt, the Court took the petition under submission with the intent to grant.

Ms. Beck was advised that a copy of the signed order would be mailed to her address on Buchanan Street, and she confirmed the address with the courtroom clerk.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
